top_signals.title: Russian gas cargoes to remain exempt as EU nears new sanctions deal
top_signals.summary: Groups such as Greece’s Dynagas will be allowed to continue carrying Russian LNG
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Anthropic payout piles pressure on UK ministers in AI copyright row
top_signals.summary: The publishing industry has urged ministers to force AI companies to license copyrighted content after Anthropic agreed a record $1.5bn (£1.1bn) settlement over its use of pirated books to train AI models. Dan Conway, chief executive of the Publishers Association, told City AM the agreement should serve as a warning to AI developers operating in [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Segro ‘minded to accept’ £14bn Prologis takeover
top_signals.summary: Segro has said it is “minded to accept” the £14bn takeover offer tabled by US real estate giant Prologis.  The FTSE 100 property firm said on Wednesday evening that the terms of Prologis’s fourth bid are at a level it would be willing to recommend to its shareholders.  Segro’s update came just five minutes before [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
